listeners.purpose: Emit a structured `geofence.evaluated` log line via the app logger (workspace_id, fenceable_type, fenceable_id, result, mode, distance_m, accuracy_m, subject_type, subject_id). Sync so the log lands in the same request context.

Emit metrics: increment academorix.geofence.evaluations.total by (result, mode, fenceable_type, subject_type), observe academorix.geofence.evaluation.duration_ms + academorix.geofence.distance_to_fence_m.

Mint a new INSIDE GeofenceCheck row with supersedes_check_id set. Copies fenceable_type + fenceable_id + subject_type + subject_id verbatim from the original row so the override lives in the same audit thread. Fires GeofenceOverrideApplied.
Structured `geofence.override_applied` log line for compliance-grade audit trail. Persisted to audit_log by the audit module's AuditListener.
Invalidate the workspace + per-fenceable caches. Update the 'last activity' timestamp used by the RecentGeofenceActivityCheck health probe.
Clear the geofence.fenceable:{type}:{id} Redis entry so the next evaluate() re-reads the geometry from the source model.

Discover every #[Geofenceable] + #[GeofenceSubjectAlias] attribute across the codebase. Compile into two morph maps (fenceable_map + subject_map) + register both via Relation::enforceMorphMap(). Refuse duplicate aliases across each namespace. Cache the maps in Redis.
